## [00:00 - 01:10]

Let's face it, everybody's got two cents and everybody's got two minutes. So here's my two cents in under two minutes. A new gingrich is in the news and in the news in a big way. Look, this guy is a, only way I can say that this guy is a bad ass dude. He is a perfect example of a guy that does not give up and you shouldn't either. He's staying on message, he's pitching his deal, he's tremendous, tremendous debater, well prepared, presents himself well. And look, once he makes a commitment to a way, dude, he pitches it like, this is right, I'm saying it whether you like it or not. I'm saying whether you vote for me or not, this is the truth. And that's what all of us need to learn to do in this economy at this time. Man, know what you stand for, present well, stay with it, never, ever quit. This guy's come from being four points in most polls to getting a New Hampshire support from a union to getting top in the polls in many states. Newt, gotta give it to you, my brother, my Mr. Silver White haired, been around politics forever, three divorces under your belt, still pitching and pushing, still gaining ground, dude, I gotta give it to you, never quit.
